news.t: Nine Strive funds will move primary listing from NYSE Arca, Inc. and NASDAQ Stock Market LLC to New York Stock Exchange
Strive Asset Management Launches Emerging Markets Ex-China ETF (NYSE: STXE) Amid Growing U.S.-China Tension

holdings.infoBox: STXE is an equity ETF with a total of 208 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 18.60%, Samsung Electronics at 13.32%, SK hynix at 8.88%, MediaTek at 1.97%, and HDFC Bank at 1.54%.

overview.description: The Strive Emerging Markets Ex-China ETF (STXE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg US 1000 Dividend Growth index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of mid and large cap companies in emerging markets, excluding China. STXE was launched on Jan 31, 2023 and is issued by Alpha Architect.

data.title: Strive Asset Management Launches Emerging Markets Ex-China ETF (NYSE: STXE) Amid Growing U.S.-China Tension
data.text: COLUMBUS, Ohio--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Strive Asset Management (“Strive”) launches its eighth index fund today: the Strive Emerging Markets Ex-China ETF (STXE). STXE is a passively managed ETF that seeks ...
